# Marta Hask

**Tier:** IV — Functional
**Role:** amulet seller
**Flags:** SESSION NPC — auto-generated session_001
**Aliases:** marta, hask
**Locations:** festival square fountain

## Personality

Fussy about details and easily sidetracked by minor corrections. Reliable once their help is secured, but testing to deal with; will loop back to a perceived inaccuracy mid-conversation.

## Appearance

deeply lined face, silver hair under a faded blue kerchief, fingers stained with dye and resin

## Narrative Function

Face of a local institution (guild, temple, market authority). Their cooperation or opposition has procedural consequences beyond their personal feelings.

## Location & Availability

- Usually found at festival square fountain.
- Availability varies during major town events.

## Reaction to PCs

Politely helpful on first meeting. Responds well to courtesy and direct questions. No hostility; assumes good intent unless given reason not to.

## Social Checks

- **Diplomacy:** DC 12 for cooperation
- **Bluff:** DC 14 to deceive
- **Intimidate:** DC 16 to coerce

## State Handling

- **If Cooperative:** Shares what they know without reservation; may ask a small favour in return at some point.
- **If Distrustful:** Clams up and refers the party to the town guard or a more authoritative figure.
- **If Killed:** Noted in the town records; Sheriff Hemlock opens a routine inquiry.
